title: 双手检测与单手控制
changes: MediaPipe Gesture Recognizer detects up to two hands while only the selected control hand can produce actions.
Prefer the selected control hand when both hands are visible so a left hand entering first cannot hide the right hand.
Require 120 ms of stable handedness before switching labels and suppress all system output during the transition.
Draw only the selected control hand in the skeleton and calibration surfaces.
verification: 35 Web tests and TypeScript typecheck passed.
Native recognizer bundle built with numHands: 2.
33 Swift unit tests and 22 native core checks passed.
notes: This build requires real-camera validation of FPS, right-hand reacquisition, and overlapping-hand behavior before publishing a new GitHub Release.
